title: Updates limitations
excerpt: Hi, does anyone know if there is a limit to the amount of updates you can write in the ‘updates’ section? I am being told it is a maximum of 1000 per board but I wondered if anyone has written more than this? Thanks

posts.author: Lloyd (Lloyd Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, does anyone know if there is a limit to the amount of updates you can write in the ‘updates’ section? I am being told it is a maximum of 1000 per board but I wondered if anyone has written more than this? Thanks

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @Lloyd! I can confirm the limit is set to 1000 updates per board - CORRECTION to my response - the limit is 1000 updates per item.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml: @BiancaT, is there an item limit as well or just the board limit? Also, how do replies play into this limit?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@BiancaT

I just tested to 2000+ and it worked. It does not appear that 1000 is the limit.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: This is really helpful to know - perhaps the limit is not yet enforced…? I will share this internally - thank you Jim!

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@BiancaT

Please let us know what you find out. A limit of 1,000 updates per board seems extremely severe. 1,000 updates per item seems more in line with how the rest of monday operates.

posts.author: Athlos (Thanos Spelas (thespelas.com))
posts.cookedHtml: To the best of my knowledge there’s no limitation in updates, I think I’ve seen it go to over 4k in one item in the past.

posts.author: Lloyd (Lloyd Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for the response, everyone. I am currently using the ‘notes’ to keep my updates on as Monday.com team told me it allows more than the ‘updates’ tab. I would prefer to use the ‘updates’ section as it is a lot cleaner and you can do more with it. We are a legal services company, so as you can imagine we do a lot of updates on each clients record. If someone can confirm that it is 1000 updates per item/ client (rather than per board) then that would be great!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi everyone - thanks so much for your patience with me! I have recently heard back from our developers who confirmed that the limit is in fact 1000 updates per item not per board - my sincerest apologies for the confusion caused here! As for replies, they’re not included in the limit
